name: Kokopelli Golf Club
about: Kokopelli Golf Club is a 18-hole facility featuring redesigned course with spacious Bermuda fairways and large, undulated Bent Grass greens. The club offers a full range of amenities including a golf simulator suite, lessons, tournament hosting, and event space for weddings and corporate meetings. It is also home to The Turn Restaurant & Lounge, which provides an extensive selection of bourbon, beer, wine, and signature cocktails. The club positions itself as a top regional destination and a true Midwest golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Top 100 Places You Can Play course ranked by Golf Digest
Premium on-site golf simulator suite for year-round play
Full-service restaurant and lounge with extensive drink selection
Versatile event space accommodating up to 250 guests
Professional staff available for lessons and event management

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant available on-site at The Turn Restaurant & Lounge.
The Turn offers an extensive selection of bourbon, beer, wine, and signature cocktails.

simulator_hardware.notes: The website mentions a 'Golf Simulator Suite' but does not specify the brand or model of the simulator hardware.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not mentioned. The club has The Turn Restaurant & Lounge which provides meals and an extensive selection of alcoholic beverages.

faq.question: How long does a typical 18-hole round take in the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator session. Contact the venue directly for more information on playing times.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be family-friendly, offering a course suitable for all player levels and hosting events like family reunions.
